$comment: WF-### → its mapped journey/e2e spec. Seeded semi-automatically from apps/dentalemon/scripts/run-journey-harness.ts (the EXPECTED roster: J## name + rubricIds, some citing WF-* codes) and from §12 composition notes in docs/product/WORKFLOW_MAP.md. JOURNEY anchors (rubric/name → canonical WF) are the strongest signal; well-named e2e specs cover the remaining unambiguous CRUD workflows. Every status:covered entry MUST name a spec that exists on disk (validated by the generator). Edit only with a justification — unmapped WF + WFG gaps live in workflow.allowlist.json.

WF-002.anchor: JC-2: passkey (WebAuthn) registration-options is mounted + session-gated + returns a challenge (auth-passkey.hurl). The full register/authenticate ceremony needs a real authenticator (out of scope for a wire contract); previously ZERO tests of any kind.

WF-003.anchor: JC-2: magic-link (the sole patient login path) proven end-to-end — contract (request→Mailpit→verify→durable session) + live journey J24 (UI drive → consume emailed link → independent session read). Root-cause fix: added the missing auth.magic-link email template (queue processor threw 'No active template found' → patients silently locked out). Previously unmapped + actually broken.

WF-010.anchor: journey J04: treatment mark performed in revenue chain (BR-006/BR-007)

WF-006.anchor: journey J17 rubric WF-SCH-001 → appointment booking

WF-009.anchor: journey J23 (JC-1): charts a tooth condition + treatment through the real UI and reads the SPECIFIC entry (cdtCode+toothNumber) back via independent GET. NOTE: J01 is covered-shallow (asserts chart CONTROLS render only, never persists) — J23 is the genuine WF-009 persistence proof.

WF-011.anchor: journey J23 (JC-1): types a fresh SOAP note in soap-notes-sheet and reads the TYPED subjective text back via independent GET. Previously UNMAPPED (J22 seeds notes via API, J10 only the addendum path).

WF-074.anchor: journey J23 (JC-1): the continuous day-in-the-life visit — new visit → chart entry+treatment (WF-009) → SOAP note (WF-011) → mark performed (WF-010) → invoice (WF-013) → complete (WF-012), with an independent persistence read at every step. Previously uncovered-composite (stitched from J21+J01+J04+J22).

WF-012.anchor: journey J22: drives the real Complete-visit button → PATCH completed → independent read status==='completed' + zero active left. (J04 marks-performed+invoices but does NOT complete the visit; J22 is the genuine WF-012 proof — JC-3 core gate.)

WF-013.anchor: journey J04 flagship revenue chain → create invoice (BR-009)

WF-014.anchor: journey J25 (JC-4): drives the real Record-Payment form in the billing detail sheet → independent read asserts the invoice is durably 'paid', balanceCents 0.

WF-018.anchor: journey J19 present → e-sign → accept; e2e consent-signing also exercises BR-014

WF-019.anchor: e2e: imaging study upload + annotate surface

WF-021.anchor: journey J23 (JC-3): completing the visit auto-generates the PMD (updateDentalVisit → generatePmdForVisit); J23 independent-reads GET /dental/visits/:id/pmd asserting a checksum'd snapshot persisted. (Also pmd-generation.spec.ts, not in the journey harness.)

WF-022.anchor: journey J20 rubric BR-022 → import external PMD

WF-026.anchor: e2e: configure branch hours during onboarding (FR6.2)

WF-028.anchor: journey J10: WF-028 audit-log compliance proof (browser-level)

WF-030.anchor: journey B01 rubric CIMG-001/002 → cephalometric analysis

WF-031.anchor: journey B02 rubric CIMG-003 → ceph landmark placement

WF-038.anchor: journey J10 void/amend signed entry → clinical amendment (+ WF-028 audit proof)

WF-041.anchor: journey J26 (JC-4): drives the real Void form + Mark-Uncollectible confirmation in the billing UI → independent reads assert durable 'voided' / 'uncollectible'.

WF-BIL-REFUND.anchor: journey J27 (JC-4): drives the per-payment Refund form in the billing UI → independent read asserts the refund durably reopened the invoice (balance restored, no longer 'paid').

WF-042.anchor: e2e: fee schedule lookup on invoice (FR6.3)

WF-045.anchor: journey J21 → create visit from workspace (two-step POST draft → PATCH active)

WF-070.anchor: journey J18 rubric WF-ORG-001 → new clinic owner self-onboards (org/branch create)

WF-088.anchor: journey J28 (JC-4): platform admin approves a patient erasure request through Settings → Data Erasure → independent read asserts the request is durably 'anonymized'. (Also data-erasure-admin.spec.ts, not in the journey harness.)

WF-P01.anchor: journey J03 perio charting linked to odontogram → create perio chart

WF-P02.anchor: journey J03 → record tooth-level perio readings

WF-090.anchor: §12 cross-module: visit→invoice (WF-013 ⊃ WF-090), flagship revenue chain

WF-096.anchor: §12 cross-module: audit trail on every write (all→dental-audit), J10 WF-028 proof

WF-097.anchor: §12 cross-module: fee schedule on invoice billing→org

WF-100.anchor: §12 cross-module: external EMR/PMD import into patient records

WF-101.anchor: §12 cross-module: PMD import creates records (read-only store, BR-022)

WF-093.anchor: §12 marks WF-093 BROKEN (G-003 direct repo import); BR-019 supervisor-amendment-approval is a feature-flagged 501 stub (dental_clinical_amendment_approval). Deferred until the integration seam + approval endpoint are built.

WF-P05.anchor: WF-P05 PDF perio export is V2 DEFERRED (not built — no server render / @media print / Print button); see WORKFLOW_MAP §2b reconcile note + STANDARDS_COMPLIANCE deferred backlog.
